steps.title: Find the contrast signal
steps.content: The word “whereas” signals that the situation after it is the opposite of the one before it.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the contrast
steps.content:
Intensified information flow makes people more decisive, so the blank must describe a flow that makes them slower — i.e., a reduction in flow.

Therefore “reduced” fits the contrast. The other three choices (evaluated, determined, acquired) do not express a decrease in flow and thus fail to match the opposite meaning set up by “whereas”.
That matches Choice A — reduced.
